steps.title: Set profit equal to target
steps.content:
The profit function is $p(x) = 5x - 190$. To earn a profit of $400, we set:
$$5x - 190 = 400$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Add 190 to both sides:
$$5x = 590$$
Divide both sides by 5:
$$x = 118$$
They must sell 118 car stickers to earn \$400 in profit.
